name: Valve.Template → Publish
description: You can also publish a state to a template valve from elsewhere in your YAML filewith the `valve.template.publish` action.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The ID of the template valve.

config_entries.label: Current Operation
config_entries.description: The current operation mode to publish. One of `IDLE`, `OPENING` and `CLOSING`. If using a lambda, use `VALVE_OPERATION_IDLE`, `VALVE_OPERATION_OPENING`, and `VALVE_OPERATION_CLOSING`.

config_entries.label: Position
config_entries.description: The position to publish, from 0 (CLOSED) to 1.0 (OPEN)

config_entries.label: State
config_entries.description: The state to publish. One of `OPEN`, `CLOSED`. If using a lambda, use `VALVE_OPEN` or `VALVE_CLOSED`.
